hero_title_accent: Designed for Regulated Digital Asset Businesses

problem_title: Enterprise compliance weakens without robust governance
problem_description: Mature digital asset businesses struggle with inconsistent access controls, incomplete audit logs, and fragmented evidence across systems. This hinders their ability to maintain clear operational oversight, meet institutional trust expectations, and prepare comprehensive bank due diligence packages.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes role-based access, preserves audit logs and consolidates evidence integrity across workflows to provide mature VASPs with a unified compliance operating model for institutional trust and regulatory readiness.
workflow_title: From access control to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY manages role-based permissions, records user actions, preserves evidence integrity and compiles audit logs to support institutional governance and compliance review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enterprise compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a secure compliance control layer connecting provider outputs, regulatory monitoring, cases, evidence and reporting for regulated digital asset businesses at enterprise scale.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY organizes fragmented provider data into connected workflows, routing reviews, applying policies, creating cases and tracking decisions across onboarding, risk, Travel Rule and transaction monitoring.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and evidence packages with role-based access and audit logs to support internal reviews, audits and regulator inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs securely within a governed compliance operating model.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY does not replace providers but structures their outputs into auditable workflows, decisions and reports to reduce manual work and improve compliance governance.
final_title: Review your compliance security and governance model
final_description: See how SFTY supports role-based access, audit-ready evidence and scalable governance for mature VASPs and institutional compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
